content: BrasilAPI CNPJ v1 endpoint: GET https://brasilapi.com.br/api/cnpj/v1/{cnpj14digits}. Returns full company registration JSON with fields: uf, cep, cnpj, razao_social, nome_fantasia, cnae_fiscal (integer), cnae_fiscal_descricao, situacao_cadastral (integer: 2=ATIVA), descricao_situacao_cadastral (string), data_inicio_atividade (ISO date string), data_situacao_cadastral, qsa (partners array), cnaes_secundarios, natureza_juridica, regime_tributario, logradouro, numero, bairro, municipio, email, ddd_telefone_1, capital_social, opcao_pelo_mei, opcao_pelo_simples. CORS enabled (browser-safe). No API key required. Error: 404 JSON with status:404, message:'Not found' for CNPJ not found. Invalid format returns 400. Rate limits: not formally published; safe for on-demand UI lookups.
